title: Create: Springs
description: Store rotational force using springs! create 6.0+
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bcd698ab7a37511596c3be75cb9d618c8ef2aa.png)

### About:

Create Springs is an addon for Create that adds springs and spring related things, it allows for storing rotational force and there is a Lot of ways to use energy that stored in springs

### Content
-Spring: stores rotational force

-Large Spring: multiblock, strores a LOT of rotational forse

-Friction Welder: multiblock, another way to process blocks

-Kinetic Interface: way to use springs on contraptions

-Spring Catapult: can eject items far away in any dierection

-Punchcard: can program tools


-Hat: hat

-Sus package

-6 spring tools

-portative steam engine


## Compatibility
Portative Steam Engine will warm players if Cold Sweet is installed (2.3)
JEI compatibility
